tastingNotes.palate: Commanding and complex aromas on the nose, the fruit notes show the richness and opulence of the wines in Tuscany. On the palate it is round and balanced, well structured with good pleasantness of the tannin which is perceived sweetly ripened in the finish.

vineyardNotes: Estate bottled. DOCG certification.
